pokemon:silvally.name: Silvally
pokemon:silvally.summary: Although its name was Type: Null at first, the boy who evolved it into this form gave it the name by which it is now known.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Although its name was Type: Null at first, the boy who evolved it into this form gave it the name by which it is now known.
The final factor needed to release this Pokémon’s true power was a strong bond with a Trainer it trusts.
Its trust in its partner is what awakens it. This Pokémon is capable of changing its type, a flexibility that is well displayed in battle.
A solid bond of trust between this Pokémon and its Trainer awakened the strength hidden within Silvally. It can change its type at will.
Through the bond it formed with its Trainer, its will was strengthened, and it was able to destroy its control mask.
This is its form once it has awakened and evolved. Freed from its heavy mask, its speed is greatly increased.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Although its name was Type: Null at first, the boy who evolved it into this form gave it the name by which it is now known.

pokemon:type-null.name: Type Null
pokemon:type-null.summary: Due to the danger that this synthetic Pokémon may go on a rampage, it wears a control mask to restrain its power.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Due to the danger that this synthetic Pokémon may go on a rampage, it wears a control mask to restrain its power.
It was modeled after a mighty Pokémon of myth. The mask placed upon it limits its power in order to keep it under control.
The heavy control mask it wears suppresses its intrinsic capabilities. This Pokémon has some hidden special power.
Rumor has it that the theft of top-secret research notes led to a new instance of this Pokémon being created in the Galar region.
There’s danger of its going on a rampage, so its true power is sealed away beneath its control mask.
A Pokémon weapon developed for a specific mission, it went berserk during an experiment, so it was cryogenically frozen.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Due to the danger that this synthetic Pokémon may go on a rampage, it wears a control mask to restrain its power.
